- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (fix/)

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch is rebased on latest `main`
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](CONTRIBUTING.md#-commit-messages-conventional-commits) format
- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] No debug prints or commented code
- [ ] Changes documented (code comments, README updates if needed)
